hiver_starter

Module cache 

Source
Expand description

Cache 自动配置 Cache 自动配置模块 / Cache Auto-Configuration Module

自动配置缓存功能。 Auto-configures caching functionality.

Structs§

CacheAutoConfiguration
缓存自动配置 Cache auto-configuration
CacheBuilder
Cache builder 缓存构建器
CacheConfig
Cache configuration 缓存配置
CacheManagerBuilder
Cache manager builder 缓存管理器构建器
CacheStats
Cache statistics 缓存统计
Cached
Cached wrapper for async functions 异步函数的缓存包装器
MemoryCache
In-memory cache implementation 内存缓存实现
SimpleCacheManager
Simple cache manager 简单缓存管理器

Constants§

DEFAULT_CACHE
Default cache name 默认缓存名称
DEFAULT_MAX_CAPACITY
Default maximum cache size 默认最大缓存大小
DEFAULT_TTL_SECS
Default TTL (time to live) in seconds 默认TTL（生存时间），单位秒

Traits§

Cache
Cache trait 缓存trait
CacheEvict
CacheEvict trait - equivalent to Spring’s @CacheEvict CacheEvict trait - 等价于Spring的@CacheEvict
CacheManager
Cache manager trait 缓存管理器trait
CachePut
CachePut trait - equivalent to Spring’s @CachePut CachePut trait - 等价于Spring的@CachePut
Cacheable
Cacheable trait - equivalent to Spring’s @Cacheable Cacheable trait - 等价于Spring的@Cacheable
